title: Flueggea meineckia
taxonomy: Flueggea meineckia is classified in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant belongs to the order Malpighiales. It is further classified into the family Phyllanthaceae in the APG III classification. The genus Flueggea is also a part of the family Euphorbiaceae according to some sources, however, this classification is considered outdated. In modern classifications, Flueggea meineckia is recognized as a member of the family Phyllanthaceae.
uses: Flueggea meineckia has been traditionally used in some cultures for its medicinal properties. It is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help in treating various health conditions.
